name: Favored Enemy
description: Choose one type of favored enemy. You gain benefits when tracking, recalling information about, and interacting with those creatures.

name: Natural Explorer
description: Choose a favored terrain. You gain benefits while traveling and surviving in that environment.

name: Deft Explorer
description: An optional class feature that replaces Natural Explorer, granting exploration-focused benefits that improve as you gain Ranger levels.

name: Favored Foe
description: An optional class feature that replaces Favored Enemy, allowing you to mark a creature as your favored foe and deal additional damage to it.

name: Ranger Archetype
description: Choose a Ranger Archetype, which grants additional features as you gain Ranger levels.

name: Primeval Awareness
description: You can expend a spell slot to sense whether certain creature types are present within a specified range.

name: Primal Awareness
description: An optional class feature that replaces Primeval Awareness, granting additional spells that enhance your awareness of the natural world.

name: Hide in Plain Sight
description: You can camouflage yourself, gaining a bonus to Stealth checks while you remain motionless.

name: Nature's Veil
description: An optional class feature that replaces Hide in Plain Sight, allowing you to magically become invisible for a short time.

name: Vanish
description: You can Hide as a bonus action, and magical means can't track you except by magical methods.

name: Feral Senses
description: You gain extraordinary awareness of nearby creatures, helping you detect unseen foes.

name: Foe Slayer
description: You can add your Wisdom modifier to an attack roll or damage roll against one of your favored enemies.
